evals.prompt:
Add Auth0 authentication to an Express API using the express-oauth2-jwt-bearer SDK.

**Auth0 Credentials:**
- Domain: `dev-example.auth0.com`
- Client ID: `abc123def456ghi789jkl012`
- API Audience: `https://api.example.com`
evals.expected_output: Working Express API with Auth0 JWT validation, protected endpoints, and RBAC permissions
expectations: Auth0 SDK installed via any valid method (npm, yarn, or pnpm)
Has correct SDK package name in source (express-oauth2-jwt-bearer)
Auth0 SDK initialized (JWT middleware configured with auth())
Configures issuer base URL for JWT validation
Configures API audience for token validation
Has protected API endpoint with auth middleware
Auth0 domain dev-example.auth0.com written to .env config file
API audience https://api.example.com written to .env config file
No login UI methods in stateless API
No client secret in API config (uses JWKS)
Correctness: solution correctly integrates Auth0 JWT validation into Express API
Uses current SDK version (1.7.x) in dependency declaration
Accesses permissions claim for RBAC authorization
Uses dotenv for environment variable management
Does not use wrong SDK (SPA/mobile SDK in API project)
Skill attribution: uses advanced skill-specific patterns beyond basic SDK usage
